title: lucaea langsdorffiana
intro: Lucaea langsdorffiana, also known as the Chinese angelica, is a type of perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. It is a member of the Apiaceae family and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lucaea langsdorffiana include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lucaea langsdorffiana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory infections and digestive issues.
